title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Meesho. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Meesho:
Meesho is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho!
